text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me, sir! This seat is free, so please go
ahead and sit here!

text_block_list.name: Old Man
text_block_list.text: Oh! I appreciate it, lass. Oof!

text_block_list.name: Old Man
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Well, I'm old enough to have people give up their seats and call me "sir," huh? And here I thought I was still plenty young!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Oh! I'm sorry! I don't mean anything by that. You
still look really healthy and energetic, of course!
It's just, um... Er...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black is unable to think of what to say to
comfort the man and becomes quite stressed.
